Disney+ הוא ״תוסף״ מצוין, אבל לעיתים רחו: Disney+ is a great add-on, but often it's the only service a family needs. Most of the time it sits alongside Netflix (a vast library for adults) or free channels via antenna. The important question isn't 'how much does Disney+ cost' but 'how much does my entire streaming mix cost together' — and that's where most families overpay for services they barely use.

ריסטארט ONT: אם יש ONT (קופסה כתומה/שחור: ONT restart: If you have an ONT (yellow/black box) — turn it off too. ONT first, router second.
